structured_variables.situation: Possible liquidity pressure with unusual activity requires review.
structured_variables.evidence_summary: Five near-identical cash-outs occurred while shared cash was falling quickly.
structured_variables.uncertainty_statement: The pattern may be caused by normal event-driven demand.
